name: better-workflows
description: Native-first, evidence-driven Codex workflows with deterministic safety gates.

interface.longDescription: Native-first workflows with root-owned mutation, bounded subagent waves, CLI-proven multi-model deliberation, freshness checks, independent critics, and fail-closed side-effect gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $better-workflows to handle this task safely.
Use $better-workflows:self-improve to turn recent workflow evidence into a synchronized, validated Better Workflows improvement or an explicit no-change decision.
Use $monorepo-refactor to inventory the monorepo, implement every eligible refactor recommendation, and validate each slice with persistent goal checkpoints.
Review this repository with verified evidence.
